title: Advanced Algorithm Engineering Capstone · Algorithm Workbench
summary: Build and defend a planning engine across graph, optimization, and uncertain-load requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of an advanced algorithm system with proof and operations packet while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare exact, approximate, randomized, and baseline candidates under one evidence model.
Connect proof obligations to executable invariants, oracle comparisons, and counterexamples.
Enforce time, memory, recursion, and output budgets under adversarial scale.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
